subject: Steps source-semantic v19e representative preflight
rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.
scope: Five same-state checkpoints, four representative temporal sequences, and an active 1024-square nested-path Web run were approved for a retained supervised research trial; this is not complete-game coverage or release authorization.
systemic_change: The accepted source-semantic visuals and source-derived visibility compositing are preserved from v19d.
Every packaged HTML, CSS, kernel, font, profile, game-module, and service-worker URL resolves relative to its deployment directory.
Service-worker caches and navigation fallbacks are isolated by registration scope so sibling game deployments cannot overwrite one another.
human_direction_feedback: 已经非常不错了，我批准了，可以了，继续吧

human_review.limitations: The recorded project-owner decision closes only this local retained-trial scope; it cannot authorize publication or prove complete-game review.
